summary: Completed frontend testing for salon website refactoring. Fixed CRITICAL bug: missing lucide-react icon imports (CheckCircle, MessageSquare, Phone, Clock, Users) that caused blank page. After fix, all 13 test cases passed. WebsitePage.jsx was successfully refactored from 1700 to 1269 lines with 8 extracted components working correctly.

fixed_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Missing lucide-react icon imports (CheckCircle, MessageSquare, Phone, Clock, Users) caused React render error and blank page
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Added missing icons to import statement on line 8-10

passed_tests: TEST 1: Homepage loads correctly with all sections visible
TEST 1a: Navbar logo visible
TEST 1b: Hero title 'La tua bellezza merita il meglio' visible
TEST 2: Desktop nav links (Chi siamo, Galleria, Recensioni, Contatti) present
TEST 2a: Mobile admin button (data-testid='mobile-admin-btn') exists
TEST 2b: 'I miei appuntamenti' link visible
TEST 2c: 'Accedi al Gestionale' button visible
TEST 3: Hero section - badge 'Solo per appuntamento' visible, Prenota ora button visible
TEST 4: Stats bar - 40+, 1983, 100%, 5★ all visible
TEST 5a: Chi Siamo section - title 'Passione per la bellezza' visible
TEST 5b: metti-la-testa-a-posto.jpg image visible (data-testid='metti-la-testa-img')
TEST 5c: Features list visible in Chi Siamo
TEST 6: CTA section 'Pronta per il tuo look?' appears BEFORE gallery section
TEST 6a: CTA section buttons (Prenota online, WhatsApp, Phone, Gestisci appuntamento) all present
TEST 7a: Gallery section tabs ('I nostri lavori', 'Il salone') present
TEST 7b: Gallery tab switch works correctly
TEST 8: Reviews section - 6 review cards displayed with star ratings
TEST 9: Contact section - address, phone, email, hours all visible
TEST 10a: Footer logo visible
TEST 10b: Copyright text 'Tutti i diritti riservati' visible
TEST 11: Booking flow Step 1 - service selection works
TEST 11a: Booking flow Step 2 - date input, time slots grid, operator select all present
TEST 11b: Busy slots (10:00, 14:30 on 2026-03-18) show as red/strikethrough
TEST 11c: Booking flow Step 3 - name, phone inputs and Riepilogo section present
TEST 12a: Mobile admin button visible on mobile viewport
TEST 12b: Fixed bottom CTA 'Prenota ora' button visible on mobile
TEST 12c: Desktop nav links hidden on mobile
TEST 13: Promo cards (7 found) have cursor-pointer and data-testid
TEST 13a: Selected promo badge appears after clicking promo card
TEST 14: Nav link scroll navigation - all 4 links (Chi siamo, Galleria, Recensioni, Contatti) scroll to correct sections
critical_code_review_comments: The refactoring was successful - all 8 components (Navbar, HeroSection, StatsBar, AboutSection, CTASection, GallerySection, ReviewsSection, ContactSection, FooterSection) are working correctly
Console warning about hydration: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' in operator select dropdown - minor issue from Emergent visual editor wrapping, doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Test appointments exist at 2026-03-18 10:00 and 14:30 for busy slot testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring complete and tested. All 8 extracted components working. Fixed critical import bug. App renders correctly on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Booking flow works end-to-end with service selection, date/time selection (busy slots displayed), and review step. Promo cards clickable with badge display. Nav links scroll to correct sections.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Missing lucide-react icon imports caused blank page render error
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed import from 'Scissors, Gift, Calendar, Pencil, Trash2, ArrowRight, X, AlertCircle' to include 'CheckCircle, MessageSquare, Phone, Clock, Users'
